description: Every Skool community feature, plus a local SQLite mirror, FTS, and cross-community ops no other Skool tool ships.

novel_features.name: Top posts
novel_features.description: Rank recent posts by upvotes, comments, or engagement and return them with full content.

novel_features.name: Leaderboard
novel_features.description: Top members by points for the community, with level and bio fields included.

novel_features.name: Digest since
novel_features.description: Aggregate everything new across posts, comments, members, and lessons since a timestamp.

novel_features.name: Cross-community SQL
novel_features.description: Run read-only SQL across every community in your local store.

novel_features.name: Calendar to ICS
novel_features.description: Export upcoming community events to an .ics file for Google Cal / Outlook.

novel_features.name: Classroom export
novel_features.description: Export an entire course to a markdown bundle (modules, lessons, attachments, video URLs).
